rationale: Top-of-page identifier — the foreign corporation's name as it appears in its home jurisdiction. Foreign-form convention per CORP_FICT-4 / LLC_MLLC-12 / CORP_HO-E911.

Small /Tx widget (rect width ≈17) functioning as a checkbox for 'new'. Mutually-exclusive with 2three. Enum value 'new'. The form intends an X mark — implemented as /Tx rather than /Btn (template anomaly).

Small /Tx widget (rect width ≈17) functioning as a checkbox for 'renewal'. Mutually-exclusive with 2two. Enum value 'renewal'. Drafter originally mapped this to entity.home_jurisdiction — corrected during review based on rect (tiny ≈17-wide widget on the same y-row as 2two, immediately preceding the 'renewal' label).

label_verbatim: SECOND: The state or country under the laws of which it is incorporated is ____
rationale: Trailing blank ending the SECOND paragraph 1 (rect x=370..573 — right side only, matches a trailing-line blank). Holds the foreign entity's home state or country. Reuses the entity.home_jurisdiction key family (CORP_FICT-4, CLKRA-3, MLLC-12, MBCA-12, HO-E911). Drafter originally mapped this to entity.principal_office.physical_address — corrected during review based on rect position and the SECOND paragraph layout.

label_verbatim: SECOND: ...and the address of its principal office is located at: ____ (line 1)
rationale: Wide labeled line for the principal office address line 1 (street). Two-line address_line{1,2} pattern (same shape as registered_office.address_line{1,2} on MNPCA-11 / 11A / 11C — extended to entity.principal_office.* for this form's three-physical-line address layout).

label_verbatim: SECOND: ____ (street, city, state and zip code) (line 2)
rationale: Wide labeled line for the principal office address line 2 (street, city, state, zip code) per the parenthetical label below the widget.

label_verbatim: THIRD: The date of its incorporation is ____
rationale: Original incorporation date in the home jurisdiction. Same conceptual key as the formation-date semantics on CORP_FICT-4 / MLLC-12 (named entity.maine_authorization_date there for the Maine authorization date — distinct from this form's home-jurisdiction date of incorporation).

label_verbatim: FOURTH: A brief statement of the nature of the corporation's activities to be conducted in Maine.
rationale: Free-text description of activities the foreign nonprofit will conduct in Maine. Reuses the entity.maine_business_purpose key family used for foreign-qualification forms.

label_verbatim: *By ____ (signature of any duly authorized individual) / (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Combined name+capacity of the duly authorized signing individual. Shape D per 2026-04-30-filing-signer-shape.md.
